landing.heroSub: Research-backed tools for people serious about what goes in — and what stays out — of their brain.
landing.pillarsSub: From what you take to what you avoid — every variable that shapes how your brain performs.
landing.pillar1Desc: Evidence-graded compounds for cognition, memory, focus, and neuroprotection.
landing.pillar2Desc: Heavy metals, solvents, pesticides. What damages neural tissue and how to reduce exposure.
landing.pillar3Desc: Emerging evidence on BBB penetration, neuroinflammation, and long-term accumulation.
landing.pillar4Desc: Sleep, stress, exercise, nutrition. The foundations no supplement can replace.
landing.pillar5Desc: Synergies, interactions, timing. Build protocols that work together, not against each other.
landing.threatsSub: The biggest gains often come from removing threats, not adding supplements.
landing.stackSub: Build compound stacks based on your goals, check interactions, and get dosing windows — all in one place.
landing.closingEyebrow: A note on who this is for

blog.sub: Research breakdowns, protocol guides, and skillmaxxing science — written for people who actually want to understand what they're putting in their brain.
blog.nlSub: New research, protocol updates, and compound breakdowns — straight to your inbox. No spam.
blog.noPostsSub: First articles are on the way.

post.notFoundSub: This article may have been removed or the link is wrong.
post.loadErrorSub: Check your connection and try again.

common.cookieNotice: We use cookies to improve your experience.
